label: Ritual role behavior
description: Defines the duty, position, and speaker interaction for a specific role within a ritual stage.

roleId.label: Role ID
roleId.description: ID of the RitualRole this behavior applies to.

dutyDef.label: Duty def
dutyDef.description: DutyDef assigned to pawns in this role during the stage.

jobReportOverride.label: Job report override
jobReportOverride.description: Localized text overriding the job report shown for the pawn in this role. Supports {PAWN} token.

customPositions.label: Custom positions
customPositions.description: Ordered list of position objects tried in sequence to place the pawn. Each li selects a class via the Class attribute.

speakerInteraction.label: Speaker interaction
speakerInteraction.description: InteractionDef played by this role pawn as a speaker during the stage.
